prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SHM-DS85IX55IDNPLJ-BL-6 Product Type: BLANK_BOOK Brand (from catalog): CCS Spy Gear Existing Title: Disappearing SpyPaper 8.5 Inch x 5.5 Inch Dissolving Note Pad Letter Journal Description: The Disappearing Paper Dissolving Blank Note Pad looks like an ordinary paper journal; but add water and it will dissolve into a paper mulch that can not be reconstructed or viewed by prying human eyes and it leaves no digital DNA to put back together.

You can write on this paper normally, but as soon as it comes into contact with liquid (even saliva) it will transform into a secure mulch. This makes it ideal for those confidential notes that may need to "disappear" quickly with little advance notice. Search Terms: spy espionage secret disappearnotebook Features: - EXTRA LARGE PAPER - Each Notepad contains 32 Sheets of Paper - Dimensions: 8.5" x 5.5" | Extra Large Sheets of Paper - Made In The USA - TURNS TO PULP - Within 10 Seconds of Contacting Liquid the Paper Disappears Like a Magic Trick into a Pulp - Great for Hiding or Disposing of Secret Notes === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: CCS Spy Gear 8.5 x 5.5 Disappearing SpyPaper Notepad

openai.item_name: CCS Spy Gear 8.5in x 5.5in Disappearing SpyPaper Note Pad

anthropic.title_differentiation: Dissolving Paper, Secret Notes, Self-Destructing, Made In USA, 32 Sheets, Water Activated, Secure Disposal

openai.title_differentiation: 32 Sheets, Extra Large 85" X 55" Pages, Turns To Pulp In 10 Seconds, Made In USA, Hides Secret Notes
